version_description: Capo on first fret with simplified, open chords.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[CHORDS]:
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch] - x04430
A-5 - x01220 or x01222[/tab]



[Intro]
[ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
[ch]Amaj7[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]
[ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
[ch]A-5[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
(Sunrise) There's a new sun a-risin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]Amaj7[/ch]    [ch]Bm[/ch]
(In your eyes) I can see a new horizon[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
(Realize) That will keep me realizin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]A-5[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]
You're the biggest part of me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]    [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
(Stay the night) Need your lovin' here beside me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Amaj7[/ch]    [ch]Bm[/ch]
(Shine a light) Need you close enough to guide me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
(All my life) I've been hopin' you would find me[/tab]
[tab][ch]A-5[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
You're the biggest part of me[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]           [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
Well, make a wish, baby[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C#m7[/ch]                [ch]F#m7[/ch]
Well, and I will make it come true[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
Make a list, baby[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#m7[/ch]               [ch]F#m7[/ch]
Of the things I'll do for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]    [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
Ain't no risk, now[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C#m7[/ch]              [ch]F#m7[/ch]
In lettin' my love rain down on you[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]B7[/ch]
So we could wash away the past[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]
So that we may start anew[/tab]

[ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
(Rainbow) Risin' over my shoulder[/tab]
[tab][ch]Amaj7[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]
(Love flows) Gettin' better as we're older[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
(All I know) All I wanna do is hold her[/tab]
[tab][ch]A-5[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]
She's the life that breathes in me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
(Forever) Got a feelin' that forever[/tab]
[tab][ch]Amaj7[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]
(Together) We are gonna stay together[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
(Forever) For me, there's nothin' better[/tab]
[tab][ch]A-5[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
You're the biggest part of me[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]          [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
Hey, make a wish, baby (Wish and it will come true)[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C#m7[/ch]              [ch]F#m7[/ch]
Well, and I will make it come true[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
Make a list, baby (Make a list of the things for you)[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#m7[/ch]               [ch]F#m7[/ch]
Of the things I'll do for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]    [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
Ain't no risk, now (Let it rain on you)[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C#m7[/ch]              [ch]F#m7[/ch]
In lettin' my love rain down on you[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]B7[/ch]
So we could wash away the past (Wash)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
So that we may start anew[/tab]

[Instrumental Break]
[ch]F#m7[/ch] [ch]Amaj7[/ch] [ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]C#m7[/ch]

[tab][ch]F#m7[/ch]  [ch]Amaj7[/ch] [ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]C#m7[/ch] [ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]C#m7[/ch]
  Oh-oh-oh[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]          [ch]C#m7[/ch]
  More than an easy feelin',[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]        [ch]C#m7[/ch]
  she brings joy to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m7[/ch]       [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
  How can I tell you[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]       [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]    [ch]C#m7[/ch]  [ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]C#m7[/ch]
what it means to me?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]         [ch]C#m7[/ch]
  Flow like a lazy river[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]     [ch]C#m7[/ch]
  for an eternity[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m7[/ch]           [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]B7[/ch]
  I've finally found someone who believes in me[/tab]
(Who believes, who believes in me)
[tab]         [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]     [ch]C#m7[/ch]   [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]  [ch]C#m7[/ch]
And I'll never leave, oh[/tab]
(Now I've found all I need)

[Instrumental Break]
[ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
[ch]Amaj7[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]
[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
   Oh, la-tee-da, now[/tab]
[tab][ch]A-5[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
  Mmm, make life grand[/tab]
[ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
[ch]Amaj7[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]
[ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
[ch]A-5[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
[ch]A7[/ch]

[Chorus]
[tab]                 [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
Hey, hey, make a wish, baby (Wish and it will come true)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C#m7[/ch]                [ch]F#m7[/ch]
Oh, and I will make it come true[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
Make a list, baby (Make a list of the things for you)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C#m7[/ch]               [ch]F#m7[/ch]
Of the things I'll do for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]    [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
Ain't no risk, now (Let it rain on you)[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C#m7[/ch]              [ch]F#m7[/ch]
In lettin' my love rain down on you[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]B7[/ch]
So we could wash away the past (Wash)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
So that we may start anew, yeah, yeah, yeah[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
(Beside me) Need your lovin' here beside me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Amaj7[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]
(To guide me) Keep it close enough to guide me[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
(Inside of me) From the fears that are inside of me[/tab]
[tab][ch]A-5[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
You're the biggest part of me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
(Forever) Got a feeling that forever[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Amaj7[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]
(Together) We are gonna stay together[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
(Forever) From now until forever[/tab]
[tab][ch]A-5[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
You're the biggest part of me[/tab]
[tab][ch]A-5[/ch]                  [ch]E[/ch]
You're the life that breathes in me[/tab]
[tab][ch]A-5[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
You're the biggest part[/tab]
Of me

[ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
[ch]Amaj7[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]
[ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
[ch]A-5[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]

[repeat until fade]
